zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner於1324年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Sir John Wettenhall III29歲，母親Agnes de Arderne19歲。他於大約1349年與Agnes de Arderne在英國英格蘭諾福爾可貝斯索普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1384年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner于1324年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Sir John Wettenhall III29岁，母亲Agnes de Arderne19岁。他于大约1349年与Agnes de Arderne在英国英格兰諾福爾可貝斯索普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1384年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner was born in 1324, in Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Wettenhall III, was 29 and his mother, Agnes de Arderne, was 19. He married Agnes de Arderne about 1349, in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1384, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner est né en 1324, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wettenhall III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Arderne, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Arderne environ 1349, à Besthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1384, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner 1324 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wettenhall III 29 und seine Mutter Agnes de Arderne 19. Er hat um 1349 in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Arderne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1384 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner è nato il nel 1324 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Wettenhall III, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Arderne, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Arderne circa 1349, nel Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1384, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warnerが1324年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Wettenhall IIIは29歳，母Agnes de Arderneは19歳であった。約1349年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクベスソルペでAgnes de Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1384年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner(이)가 1324년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wettenhall III(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Arderne(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 베스소에서 Agnes de Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1384년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner nasceu em 1324, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Wettenhall III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Arderne, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Arderne aproximadamente 1349, em Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1384, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner родился в 1324 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wettenhall III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Arderne, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Arderne около 1349 г. в местности бестаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1384 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Knight James Whetenhall Alias Warner nació en 1324, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Wettenhall III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes de Arderne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Agnes de Arderne aproximadamente 1349, en Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1384, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
